title: Aetherian Origin
description: A sun themed origin that takes inspiration from the aether mod and characters like superman
body:
A Sun themed origin a inspired by the Aether mod and characters like Superman

Description: You were born at a distant realm and send to the overworld to be protected from the destruction of your homeworld.

First Form Powers:
 - Laser Eyes - You can shoot laser out of your eyes dealing 4 hearts of damage
 - Powerful Jump - You are able to leap tall buildings in a single bound
 - Sun Charged - All your powers depend on the solar energy you accumulate either from the sun or from glowstone
 - Invulnerability - You are resistance to damage and the damage you can cause depends on your amount of solar energy
 - Low Energy - If your solar energy gets to 0 you will start to take damage
 - Useless Armor - You are unable to wear any type of armor or shield
 - Amethyst Weakness - Being in a 10 block radius of an amethyst block will cause your solar energy to rapidly decrease
 - Unarmed Fighting - You are unable to cause damage to other by using a sword or an axe
 - Away from the Sun - Going to dimensions like the end and the nether will cause your solar energy to decrease due to being too far from the sun


Second Form Powers:
 - Laser Eyes - You can shoot laser out of your eyes dealing 4 hearts of damage
 - Limit Break - You gain a temporary increase in strength at a high cost of solar energy
 - Supersonic - Not only can you fly but you can also do it at supersonic speed
 - Sun Charged - All your powers depend on the solar energy you accumulate either from the sun or from glowstone
 - Invulnerability - You are resistance to damage and the damage you can cause depends on your amount of solar energy
 - Glow - You have aura of a color of your choice glowing around you
 - Low Energy - If your solar energy gets to 0 you will start to take damage
 - Useless Armor - You are unable to wear any type of armor or shield
 - Amethyst Weakness - Being in a 10 block radius of an amethyst block will cause your solar energy to rapidly decrease
 - Unarmed Fighting - You are unable to cause damage to other by using a sword or an axe


Third Form Powers:

 - Laser Eyes - You can shoot laser out of your eyes dealing 4 hearts of damage
 - Solar Flare - You release all the energy you have, altering the gravity around you and crussig any mob within a 15 block radius
 - Supersonic - Not only can you fly but you can also do it at supersonic speed
 - Living Star - All your powers depend on the solar energy and you are able to produce your own solar energy
 - Invulnerability - You are resistance to damage and the damage you can cause depends on your amount of solar energy
 - Glow - You have aura of a color of your choice glowing around you
 - Low Energy - If your solar energy gets to 0 you will start to take damage
 - Useless Armor - You are unable to wear any type of armor or shield
 - Amethyst Weakness - Being in a 10 block radius of an amethyst block will cause your solar energy to rapidly decrease
 - Unarmed Fighting - You are unable to cause damage to other by using a sword or an axe
